decisions.rationale: IR re-read (ir/inventory.json) confirms bTIUt is a CustomElement child of ai_RNbBHXbD, sibling to ai_RNbBHXbE — not a persistent layout wrapper. CHAT-01 ui_refs list ai_RNbBHXbD and ai_RNbBHXbE but not bTIUt; CHAT-03 scope explicitly owns data-bubble-id bTIUt on ChatPanelMount wrapping ChatReusable. CHAT-01 AC-2 is satisfied via the flex-1 right-column panel slot populated by ChatPanelMount or ChatWelcomePanel; ui_evidence bTIUt passes when ?conversation= is set and absence during welcome state matches IR mutual-exclusion deferred to CHAT-03/CHAT-06. Adding a second bTIUt wrapper in ChatPageContent would duplicate the CustomElement marker and conflate layout region with panel mount ownership.

Valid layout note: ChatPageContent uses h-[calc(100vh-3.5rem)] while DashboardLayout main already has overflow-y-auto, which may cause nested scroll or viewport-offset drift vs IR fit_height fluid semantics on ai_RNbBHXbD. criteria_audit AC-1/AC-2 pass, functional_audit FV-1/FV-2 pass, and downstream CHAT-02/CHAT-03 depends_on gates need sidebar/panel slot regions and bubble-id boundaries — not a specific height inheritance model. Refine to h-full min-h-0 flex-1 in a shell layout polish pass alongside SHELL-10 deferred column-nesting gaps.

Valid ui-fidelity polish: aside ai_RNbBHXbE uses fixed md:w-64 rather than IR presentation width/fit_width tokens. ui_evidence for ai_RNbBHXbE passes and AC-2 responsive flex-col md:flex-row stack with w-full on narrow viewports already satisfies fit_width semantics at the layout level. Pixel-exact sidebar column sizing does not block CHAT-02 (conversation-sidebar internals, thread RG) depends_on gate; CHAT-02 scope owns list cell layout inside ai_RNbBHXbK. Map proportional flex-basis from styles.json in a chat layout fidelity pass after CHAT-02 lands thread content.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, no blockers, all ACs and ui_evidence pass. Accepted: C-1 bTIUt marker on ChatPanelMount per CHAT-03 ownership and IR CustomElement semantics. Deferred: C-2 shell height inheritance vs calc viewport offset (layout polish with SHELL batch); C-3 ai_RNbBHXbE fluid column width tokens (chat layout fidelity after CHAT-02).
